cardOfTheWeek.title: Mewtwo Gold Star
cardOfTheWeek.population: Population data varies by grading company and should be verified before publishing.
cardOfTheWeek.summary: A standout Gold Star era card with strong collector appeal, iconic artwork and long-term nostalgia value.
cardOfTheWeek.whyCollectorsLoveIt: Gold Star cards sit in a special place for many Pokemon collectors because of their rarity, era, artwork and chase-card history.
